member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController
member.summary: REST API endpoints for the JellyTubbing plugin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.GetUiScript
member.summary: Serves the embedded configuration page JavaScript.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.TestInvidious(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests whether the configured Invidious instance is reachable.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Channel.JellyTubbingChannel
member.summary: Jellyfin channel that streams YouTube videos via Invidious (with yt-dlp fallback).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Channel.JellyTubbingChannel.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for JellyTubbing plugin.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.InvidiousInstanceUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the Invidious instance base URL (e.g. https://invidious.example.com).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.YtDlpBinaryPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional path to the yt-dlp binary for fallback stream resolution.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PreferredQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the preferred stream quality (360p, 480p, 720p, 1080p).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.TrendingRegion
member.summary: Gets or sets the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code for trending videos (e.g. DE, US).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.InvidiousVideoItem
member.summary: A video item returned by Invidious search or trending endpoints.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.InvidiousThumbnail
member.summary: A thumbnail entry from Invidious.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.InvidiousVideoDetail
member.summary: Detailed video info including progressive stream URLs.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.InvidiousFormatStream
member.summary: A progressive (combined video+audio) stream from Invidious.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Plugin
member.summary: JellyTubbing plugin – stream YouTube videos directly in Jellyfin via Invidious.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of this plugin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.ServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers JellyTubbing services with Jellyfin's DI container.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService
member.summary: Communicates with an Invidious instance to search videos, fetch trending and resolve stream URLs.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService.IsReachableAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks whether the configured Invidious instance is reachable.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService.SearchAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches YouTube via Invidious and returns channel items.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService.GetTrendingAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns trending videos for the configured region.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService.GetBestStreamUrlAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches the best progressive MP4 stream URL for a video from Invidious. Returns null if unavailable.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService
member.summary: Resolves a YouTube video ID to a direct stream URL. Primary: Invidious progressive stream. Fallback: yt-dlp -g.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.InvidiousService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService.ResolveAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns one or more for the given YouTube video ID.
